sourceQuery:
WITH cte_baseline_proj AS
(
	SELECT proj_id, proj_url, sum_base_proj_id 
	FROM dbo.project 
	WHERE proj_url IS NOT NULL AND sum_base_proj_id IS NOT NULL 
)
--get actual task records:
SELECT t.* FROM dbo.task t   INNER JOIN dbo.project p on ltrim(rtrim(p.proj_id)) = ltrim(rtrim(t.proj_id)) and p.proj_url is not NULL  
UNION
--get all project baseline records:
SELECT t2.*
FROM dbo.task t2   INNER JOIN cte_baseline_proj bp ON t2.proj_id = bp.sum_base_proj_id

sourceQuery:
WITH cte AS (
SELECT cua.UserId, cua.Email, MAX(cua.ModifiedDate) AS MaxModifiedDate
  FROM SelfService.vwComplianceUserAssignment cua
  LEFT JOIN Explore.vwCoreUsers cu ON cua.UserId = cu.UserId
  WHERE (1=1)
  AND cua.Module IN ('HS&E','Compliance')
  GROUP BY cua.UserId, cua.Email   
)    
SELECT DISTINCT gh.ReporterId, gh.Reporter, cte.Email
FROM SelfService.vwComplianceGeneralHeaderData gh    
JOIN cte ON gh.ReporterId = cte.UserId    
LEFT JOIN SelfService.vwComplianceUserRole cur ON gh.ReporterId = cur.UserId   
WHERE gh.isActive = 1    
AND gh.Module IN ('HS&E','Compliance')   
AND cur.UserID IS NULL
description: query to get email addresses for inactive compliance users
